recommendations.title: Children of the Corn IV: The Gathering
recommendations.overview: A bright young medical student must solve the frightening mystery that plagues the children of a small Midwestern town.

recommendations.title: Campfire Tales
recommendations.overview: Anthology of famous, scary urban legends done with a modern twist.
recommendations.director: Martin Kunert, David Semel, Matt Cooper

recommendations.title: R.L. Stine's Monsterville: The Cabinet of Souls
recommendations.overview: Teenage friends must resist the spell of an evil showman staging a house of horrors show in their small town.

recommendations.title: Dark Harvest
recommendations.overview: In a small Midwestern town, a deadly annual ritual unfolds when the mythical nightmare, Sawtooth Jack, rises from the cornfields and challenges the town’s teenage boys in a bloody battle of survival.

recommendations.title: Uzumaki
recommendations.overview: The inhabitants of a small Japanese town become increasingly obsessed with and tormented by spirals.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: The Whisperer in Darkness
recommendations.overview: Folklore professor Albert Wilmarth investigates legends of strange creatures in the most remote hills of Vermont. His enquiry reveals a terrifying glimpse of the truth that lurks behind the legends.

recommendations.title: Beware the Slenderman
recommendations.overview: In this horrifyingly modern fairytale lurks an online Boogeyman and two 12-year-old girls who would kill for him. The entrance to the internet quickly leads to its darkest basement. How responsible are our children for what they find there?

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn II: The Final Sacrifice
recommendations.overview: When a tabloid reporter and his son travel to a quiet Midwestern town to investigate a gruesome massacre, they fall victim to a possessed orphan named Micah.

recommendations.title: Flatliners
recommendations.overview: Five medical students experiment with "near death" experiences, until the dark consequences of past tragedies begin to jeopardize their lives.
